--- title: "About Me" --- # About Me Hi! My name is Sami Bazzi. I am a graduate student at Boston University my degree is a master of data analytics. My interests include business analytics, data analysis, and using data driven methods to support decision making which is why i chose this major. In this course, I have been working with GitHub, Quarto, AWS, and analytics projects to build technical and presentation skills. ## My skills and Tools - Python - SQL - AWS - GitHub - Quarto - Data visualization
